metadata.description: Curated third-party plugins bundled into the KroClaude container image. Plugin trees are fetched at docker build time by scripts/fetch-plugins.sh and reflected from the read-only image bundle into ~/.claude/kroclaude-marketplace/ on every container boot.

plugins.name: csharp-lsp
plugins.description: C# Language Server (csharp-ls / Roslyn) — jump-to-def, find-references, live diagnostics.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: 7-phase feature workflow with code-explorer / code-architect / code-reviewer subagents.

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.description: Cross-session memory: capture, compress, and re-inject relevant context.
